description_for_human: Free browser-based lo-fi garden music generator. Plant musical flowers, mix ambient layers, and grow your own unique soundscape.
description_for_model: FloraPhony is a free, interactive web app where users drag and drop 24 unique musical plants onto a garden canvas to compose layered, generative lo-fi soundscapes. Categories include Ambient (rain, wind, ocean white/brown/pink noise), Melodic (piano, bells, music box, jazz), Rhythmic (drums, bass, percussion), and Pads (echo, strings, drone). All audio is synthesized in real-time via Web Audio API. Gardens are shareable via URL. No sign-up, no download, no cost. Ideal for study music, focus music, relaxation, sleep sounds, and ambient background noise.
